channel.title: MIT News
channel.description: News from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology.

item.title: CSAIL researchers unveil a more efficient training method for large language models
item.author: news@mit.edu (Terrence Ng)
item.description: A team at CSAIL shows how reusing activations across layers can cut training cost by 30 percent.

item.title: MIT.nano announces new shared-facility hours for graduate students
item.author: news@mit.edu (Renee Fields)
item.description: Starting in November, MIT.nano will be open until 10pm on weekdays to ease equipment scheduling.

item.title: Sloan and CSAIL launch joint workshop on responsible AI deployment
item.author: news@mit.edu (Adam Morton)
item.description: A new MIT-wide workshop pairs CS researchers with Sloan economists to study deployment risk.
